description: Native reforestation in the monarch-butterfly corridor; watershed + carbon benefits (Mexico City)
communityParticipation: Operates on communal lands; community involvement + CSR tree planting campaigns
biodiversityImpact: Monarch corridor restoration; endangered Teporingo habitat; mixed species

description: Restore native vegetation and improve water quality across local river basins that feed into the San Francisco Bay.
biodiversityImpact: Native riparian vegetation restoration; improved aquatic habitat for salmon and steelhead

description: Expand urban tree canopy across Bay Area neighborhoods to reduce heat, improve air quality, and support biodiversity.
communityParticipation: Neighborhood tree planting days; partnerships with local schools and community organizations
biodiversityImpact: Urban canopy expansion supporting pollinators, birds, and native understory plants

description: Restore native plants and habitats along the California coast to support pollinators, birds, and resilient coastal ecosystems.
communityParticipation: Coastal restoration volunteer programs; collaboration with local fishing communities
biodiversityImpact: Restored coastal wetlands and dune habitats; critical refuge for shorebirds, sea otters, and native coastal flora
